name: Mrs. Thomas' Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds ground beef, browned and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat and onions together until the meat is done and the onions are tender.
2. Add all other ingredients to the meat mixture.
3. Mix everything thoroughly.
4. Pour the mixture into a 2.5 quart casserole dish or two smaller dishes.
5. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
